title: Eriachne aurea
taxonomy: Eriachne aurea is a species of grass native to Australia. It belongs to the family Poaceae. Within the Poaceae family, Eriachne aurea is classified as a member of the subfamily Chloridoideae. This subfamily is further divided into several tribes, with Eriachne aurea belonging to the tribe Eriachneae. The species itself is classified as Eriachne aurea, a single species within the genus Eriachne.
uses: Eriachne aurea, also known as the golden funnel sedge, has been utilized in traditional medicine for various purposes.
